message:
feat(help): implement guided tour system

Add Tour and Spotlight modules for step-by-step onboarding:

- Tour definition with TourStep (title, content, target widget)
- TourState for navigation (next, back, skip) and event handling
- TourCompletion for persistent completion tracking
- Spotlight overlay widget with target cutout and info panel
- SpotlightConfig for customizable colors, positioning, and hints
- Auto-positioning algorithm (below → above → right → left)
- 25 unit tests covering all functionality

Implements bd-2qbx.4.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
